text: 🎉 Pokémon TCG: 30th Celebration officially revealed — September 16 worldwide. Full lineup: ETBs, Bundles, Mini Tins & ex Boxes, every card fully foiled. Each pack has 1 of 30 unique Pikachu arts + a brand-new Futuristic Rare rarity debuts. Biggest TCG release of 2026 👀 #PokemonTCG #30thCelebration

🖤 Pitch Black hits July 17 — 118 cards, 6 Mega Pokémon ex, 6 SIRs. Mega Darkrai ex headlines with Mega Zeraora ex, Chandelure ex & Excadrill ex. Bundles at $26.94. Watching every retailer the moment stock drops 👀 #PokemonTCG #PitchBlack

🌩️ Delta Reign (ME06) officially revealed — stars Mega Rayquaza ex and introduces Paired Stadiums, a new mechanic where two stadium cards play simultaneously as one. Japan July 31 as Storm Emeralda; English November 6. One to watch 👀 (via PokeBeach) #PokemonTCG #DeltaReign

⚡ Pitch Black prereleases run July 4–12 at local game stores — crack packs from a Build & Battle Box a full week before the July 17 retail launch. Find your local event at play.pokemon.com 🖤 #PokemonTCG #PitchBlack

💡 Restock tip: Booster Bundles (6 packs, $26.94) sell out faster than ETBs at most retailers — they're cheaper so collectors snap them first. Better value per pack AND gone in minutes. We alert on both the moment they hit 🔔 #PokemonTCG #Restock

⏰ Pokémon Center tip: drops most often hit Tuesday & Thursday between 9am–1pm PT (12pm–4pm ET) per tracker data — no official schedule, but that's the highest-frequency window. Have checkout info saved and notifications on 🔔 #PokemonTCG #Restock

📦 One week to Pitch Black — drops July 17. We're live-monitoring Target, Best Buy & GameStop for the moment ETBs and Bundles ($26.94) go live. Follow now so you don't miss the alert 🔔 #PokemonTCG #PitchBlack #Restock

🚀 Pitch Black drops TOMORROW — July 17. Monitoring Target, Best Buy & GameStop in real time. Bundles at $26.94 retail. Follow + hit the bell so you get the alert the second stock goes live 🔔 #PokemonTCG #PitchBlack #Restock
